waves.point_eqs_str: a['k1']=Math.cos(div(a['time'],3)); a['k2']=Math.sin(div(a['time'],2)); a['t_abs']=a['sample']; a['t_rel']=(a['sample']-div(a['time'],2.12)); a['ampl']=(Math.cos(a['t_rel'])*5); a['ox']=(Math.sin((a['t_rel']*8))+(a['ampl']*Math.sin((a['t_rel']*12)))); a['oy']=(Math.cos((a['t_rel']*13))+(a['ampl']*Math.cos((a['t_rel']*11)))); a['oz']=div(a['ampl'],3); a['r']=1; a['g']=0.5; a['b']=0; a['a']=((0.25*Math.cos(div((a['t_abs']*3.14),2)))+(0.2*below(Math.abs(((1-a['t_abs'])-a['t1'])), 0.0))); a['a']=((0.25*Math.cos((a['t_abs']*1.5)))+(0.7*below(Math.abs(a['t_abs']), 0.0))); a['xang']=(a['k1']*3); a['yang']=1; a['zang']=(3*a['k1']); a['fov']=0.22; a['monitor']=a['t2']; a['mx']=((a['ox']*Math.cos(a['zang']))-(a['oy']*Math.sin(a['zang']))); a['my']=((a['ox']*Math.sin(a['zang']))+(a['oy']*Math.cos(a['zang']))); a['ox']=a['mx']; a['oy']=a['my']; a['mx']=((a['ox']*Math.cos(a['yang']))+(a['oz']*Math.sin(a['yang']))); a['mz']=((-a['ox']*Math.sin(a['yang']))+(a['oz']*Math.cos(a['yang']))); a['ox']=a['mx']; a['oz']=a['mz']; a['my']=((a['oy']*Math.cos(a['xang']))-(a['oz']*Math.sin(a['xang']))); a['mz']=((a['oy']*Math.sin(a['xang']))+(a['oz']*Math.cos(a['xang']))); a['oy']=a['my']; a['oz']=a['mz']; a['oz']=(a['oz']-6); a['x']=(div((a['ox']*a['fov']),a['oz'])+0.5); a['y']=(div((a['oy']*a['fov']),a['oz'])+0.5);
